title: The Spirit of St. Louis
writer: Charles A. Lindbergh, Billy Wilder, Wendell Mayes
actors: James Stewart, Murray Hamilton, Patricia Smith
plot: Charles 'Slim' Lindbergh struggles to finance and design an airplane that will make his New York to Paris flight the first solo transatlantic crossing.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 1 nomination total
